final_prompt.prompt:
Create a panoramic scroll illustration of the 元宵灯会 in 唐代长安城 at night.

Style/medium: needs a "工笔重彩长卷" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 唐代壁画 tomb painting tradition, 宋画 gongbi court scrolls, 清明上河图 narrative panorama structure; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a horizontal panoramic scroll format showing wide cityscape view
Subject: must include thousands of lanterns (万盏花灯) illuminating the night sky as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: must be 唐代长安城 cityscape during 元宵灯会 festival
Lighting/mood: needs a festive night atmosphere with lantern glow — exact light distribution is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
